name: Mediterranean Chicken-And-Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Lightly packed fresh basil leaves
recipeInstructions:
5 cups Torn assorted lettuces
1 Red bell pepper, diced
1 Yellow bell pepper, diced
2 small Zucchini (8 oz.), halved lengthwise and sliced thin
1/2 cup Chopped onion
1 can (16 or 19 oz.) chickpeas, drained and rinsed
12 ounces Cooked boneless, skinless chicken breast, sliced crosswise
1. Make dressing: Puree all ingredients in a food processor or blender until smooth.
2. Pour half the dressing over lettuces in a bowl and toss; arrange on serving platter.
3. Add remaining ingredients and dressing to bowl; toss. Spoon onto greens.
PER SERVING Calories 265 Total Fat 13 g Saturated Fat 2 g Cholesterol 48 mg Sodium 323 mg Carbohydrates 16 g Protein 23 g
